title: Manufacturing Engineer - Berger Paints - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Berger Paints - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints:
Berger Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints!
